Bash(python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; now = datetime.now\(pytz.timezone\('America/New_York'\)\); print\(f'현재 뉴욕 시간: {now.strftime\(\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z\\"\)}'\); market_open = now.replace\(hour=9, minute=30, second=0\); market_close = now.replace\(hour=16, minute=0, second=0\); print\(f'장 여부: {\\"열림\\" if market_open <= now <= market_close else \\"닫힘\\"}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta; est = timezone\(timedelta\(hours=-4\)\); now = datetime.now\(est\); print\(f'현재 뉴욕 시간\(EDT\): {now.strftime\(\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\"\)}'\); open_h, close_h = 9*60+30, 16*60; cur = now.hour*60+now.minute; print\(f'장 여부: {\\"열림\\" if open_h <= cur <= close_h and now.weekday\(\) < 5 else \\"닫힘\\"}'\)")
